channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kern County residents notch top times in 2025 Bakersfield Marathon
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- No amount of rain dampened the spirit of participants of the 2025 Bakersfield Marathon. The eighth edition of the race was delayed Sunday because of rain but when the starting gun went off, the big race was on.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge homers again, Chisholm Jr. goes deep twice as Yanks rout Brewers 12-3 to complete 3-game sweep
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge homered in his first at-bat, Jazz Chisholm Jr. homered twice and the New York Yankees went deep four more times in a 12-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday, a day after becoming the third team in major league history to hit nine homers in a game.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Torpedo-shaped bats draw attention after Yankees hit team-record 9 homers in rout of Brewers
item.description: New torpedo bats drew attention when the New York Yankees hit a team-record nine homers that traveled a combined 3,695 feet.
item.dc:creator: Larry Fleisher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Paige Spiranac talks 'sexual favors' rumors at start of golf career
item.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac, who has millions of followers on social media, opened up on "sexual favors" rumors she faced early in her career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kelly Clarkson takes subtle shot at Cowboys owner Jerry Jones
item.description: Pop star Kelly Clarkson threw some subtle shade at Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on Kylie Kelce's podcast earlier in the week. But she still is optimistic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mavericks outlast Bulls 120-119 to pad lead in play-in race
item.description: Klay Thompson scored 20 points, P.J. Washington had 19 and the Dallas Mavericks beat the Chicago Bulls 120-119 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Betts, top overall seed UCLA look for March Madness success in Elite Eight meeting with LSU
item.description: With back-to-back games of at least 30 points and 10 or more rebounds, UCLA center Lauren Betts certainly appears unstoppable. But, LSU has thwarted the Bruins before — in the Sweet 16 of last years women’s NCAA Tournament. They'll get a rematch on Sunday, this time in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Giddey's half-court buzzer beater completes miraculous comeback against Lakers, 119-117
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Southwest 7, Crawford 0
item.description: Baseball time on Tuesday afternoon with Crawford hosting Southwest. The Raiders won 7-0. Sebestian Martinez was stellar on the bump for the Raiders complete game shutout scattering five hits with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: USF Football spring game features street fest & halftime alumni game
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The USF Spring Game returns to Corbett Stadium on the USF Campus on Sat., April 26 and will feature a street fest outside the stadium and the always popular alumni flag football game at halftime.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz get crushed by Memphis, 140-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Just when you think things can sink any lower for the Utah Jazz, they get outscored by 38 points in the second half in a 140-103 blowout loss to the Memphis Grizzlies Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tennessee pitcher Karlyn Pickens throws fastest pitch in college softball history
item.description: Tennessee softball standout Karlyn Pickens wrote her name into the history books on Monday with a record-breaking pitch.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, WGN 9

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sacramento State to hire Mike Bibby as basketball coach, AP source says
item.description: Former Sacramento Kings star Mike Bibby will be hired as the basketball coach at Sacramento State, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
